title.content: Two beach villas · chef · pool · 58 people
title.wc_notes: NEW EN title (AirBnB had no EN version).

description.content:
The ideal space for your family or business gathering.

🏠 Villa Rincón del Mar — beachfront, direct sea access, 6 bedrooms for up to 28 guests.

🏠 Villa Rincón de las Morenas — beach a few steps away, 70 m from the other house, 6 bedrooms for up to 30 guests.

🍳 Chef, cook and houseman included in the rental.

⭐ More than 180 five-star reviews.
description.wc_notes: EN translation. Chef INCLUIDO declared upfront.

tu_propiedad.content:
We'll prepare a detailed proposal for your family or corporate gathering. Airbnb only allows 16 people in the system — message us with your dates, number of people and details to send you a complete proposal for up to 58 guests.

🏠 WHAT THE COMBINED INCLUDES

Two villas 70 meters apart, both beachfront:

✅ Services included (no additional cost):
👨‍🍳 Chef Celene, cooks and houseman during your entire stay — meal preparation, elaborate menu available
🥩 Grilling and seafood on our visible grill
🏊 Infinity pool (RdM) + private 11×5 m pool + kids' pool (Morenas)
🏖️ Direct beach access in both villas
🛏️ 12 bedrooms, 32+ beds, 13 baths
🧹 Daily cleaning (weekly sheet change, towels every 3 days)
🎵 Audio system and TV
🛻 Support renting vans for up to 20 people with/without driver
🛥️ Coordination of yachts and boats

🛎️ Optional services with cost:
🛒 Grocery shopping and stocking — transport and service charge 5%, min $450 MXN
🍹 Drinks at palapa-bar and beach
🔥 Beach bonfire
🥥 Fresh coconuts
💆 In-house massages
🐴 Horseback riding
🚣 Coyuca Lagoon tour
🎉 Private dinners and events on request

Specialties:
Charcoal-grilled red snapper, Peruvian-style swordfish ceviche, Mexican/American/Argentine cuts perfectly done.

More than 180 five-star reviews. We help you plan: transport, beach events, excursions, diving, fishing, lagoon trips, water sports, massages — practically anything.

Welcome to Villa Rincón del Mar and Villa Rincón de las Morenas. Let the adventure begin.

acceso_huespedes.content: Guests enjoy all areas and facilities of both villas. Room service operates three days per week. For long stays, weekly sheet change.

interaccion_huespedes.content: Karina, our co-host, is available on the property to support you before and during your stay. We coordinate planning of excursions and activities, and resolve any questions via Airbnb message.

otros_detalles.content: Two beachfront villas 70 meters apart, ideal for groups of 30-58 people. For larger groups message us for personalized proposal. 35 min from airport, away from the bustle. Pets welcome ($300 MXN/night, max 2). 2-night minimum; weekends may require 3.
otros_detalles.wc_notes: EN translation. | Updated 2026-05-15: pet policy → $300/noche max 2 per Alex Q-56-1 decision.

como_llegar.content:
⛱️⛱️⛱️ Welcome Kit — Combined (Rincón del Mar + Las Morenas) ⛱️⛱️⛱️

1️⃣ YOUR TRIP AND ARRIVAL

We recommend the Acapulco-Zihuatanejo bypass from the last 'La Venta' toll booth — Google Maps/Waze will direct you that way. Highway to the coast, then 15 km by road.

Rincón del Mar location: https://maps.app.goo.gl/GEHJDhXvcTGcqxRv9

Transport with driver:
Local Acapulco — Miguel Travel Vans: +52 1 744 144 8823
From Mexico City:
— Wagon: +52 55 3987 3347
— Trosten: +52 55 3399 1000
— CamioRenta: chat.whatsapp.com/IbHmckewjCN5IFPfq7ocUi
— BambaRent: +52 55 8421 4411
— RentaAutos: +52 55 5574 4080
— CasanovaRent: +800 2272 668
— Bustravel: +52 55 8854 4492
— Conexión Travel: +52 55 1209 1153
— JJ Chargers: +52 56 1724 8703

In case you need it:
— Medical/dental 10 min: https://maps.app.goo.gl/oDDepT2qjpkw9yG56
— Farmacia del Eje 10 min: https://maps.app.goo.gl/epgtmxu62TqUUfPn6
— Farmacias Similares: https://maps.app.goo.gl/rXJ7U2551yde39WS8
— Tire repair and oil 1 km: https://maps.app.goo.gl/5wEbgQmBDH1BTfV96

⛱️⛱️⛱️

2️⃣ KITCHEN, CLEANING AND SHOPPING

Chef Celene, cook and houseman INCLUDED in your combined rental. Grocery shopping: transport and service charge 5%, min $450 MXN. All optional.

— 2 weeks before we connect you with chef Celene to define menu.
— 5 days before you send menu; shopping list ready, everything at the house on arrival.
— Kitchen starts 3 PM, lunch/dinner from 5 PM.
— Recent groups: $250-280/person/night on groceries.

⛱️⛱️⛱️

3️⃣ IF YOU PREFER TO SHOP YOURSELF

— Bodega Aurrera 10 min: https://maps.app.goo.gl/NMSzPkP1ruXv81kt9
— Sam's Club 35 min: https://maps.app.goo.gl/guak2jw1xqx3FBCV9
— Fish/Seafood Market 20 min: https://goo.gl/maps/syYzCSHx1JnZPxdCA
— 'Doña Lety' Seafood 1 km (delivery): +52 744 146 0216
— OXXO 100 m: https://maps.app.goo.gl/bH113b5SqEHh3fEf9
— 'El Güero' store 400 m: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ST3KQNsuUGeWezTZA
— Tortilla shop 300 m: https://maps.app.goo.gl/PRg36oUbrykRyVX8A

⛱️⛱️⛱️

4️⃣ ACTIVITIES AND RECOMMENDATIONS

— In-home massages · Michel: +52 744 221 7621
— Diving, snorkel, fishing, tours · AcaScuba: acascuba.com · María José: +52 1 744 383 8162
— Yachts: Carlos Vinalay: +52 744 502 7970 · Norma Rivera: +52 744 172 4413 · AcaScuba: +52 744 383 8162
— Barra de Coyuca · palapa restaurants, tours: https://goo.gl/maps/EpM51zhavj9PRv3F6
  Favorite Daribel: +52 741 115 7280
— Sea turtle release: +52 744 488 9203
— Water skiing · Tres Marías: https://maps.app.goo.gl/oPAyfoXcrKsMSFAR8
— Temazcal Macuilxochitl · Memo: +52 744 113 3330

⛱️⛱️⛱️

5️⃣ RESTAURANTS AND DELIVERY

— 'El Restaurancito' 500 m · +52 720 142 7045
— 'Bonita, su cocina' 500 m · +52 744 404 2205
— Baby's pizza/burgers/wings until 10 PM · +52 744 438 2615
— Tres Marías 5 km: https://maps.app.goo.gl/oPAyfoXcrKsMSFAR8

⛱️⛱️⛱️

6️⃣ EVENTS, DINNERS AND PARTIES

Photos on Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/18009632

— Casual beach dinners with plastic furniture — no extra cost
— Formal dinners on terrace/house with house furniture — no extra cost
— Night staff: cook 3-10 PM $500, server/bartender 5 PM-12 AM $650
— Beach ceremonies with chuppah from $5,000 · Sandra: +52 1 744 340 5686
— Formal beach dinner with lights, mats, rented furniture, 8 hrs service: from $800/guest + groceries
— Wedding/anniversary package with 3-course menu, 8 hrs service: from $1,400/guest (notify 1 month)

Recommended external services:
— DJ Pepe Vargas: +52 744 216 1023
— Mariachi Tequila Acapulco: +52 744 408 4477 · +52 744 265 1422
— Mariachi Acapulco: +52 744 415 7506
— Cuban/salsa band · Male y su son: +52 744 148 5149
— Saxophonist Alberto Jiménez: +52 744 243 1625
— Pastelería el Sueño: +52 744 324 6822

— Pasteles Alex: +52 744 419 2310
— Makeup/stylist · Danilo: +52 1 744 348 0043

— Belushama Spiritual Ceremonies: +52 735 358 6695
— Mass · Padre Benja: +52 747 108 6027
— Mass · Padre Chava Salmerón: +52 744 534 3818

Other recommendations? We'll gladly provide them.

Welcome!

— Alexander 🌅
· rincondelmar
· club

manual_casa.content:
Welcome to the two villas Rincón del Mar + Las Morenas 🌅

📶 WiFi
RdM: network 'rincondelmar' · password 'rincondelmar'
Morenas: network 'Rincondelmar1' · password 'Rincondelmar1'

🔥 Water heaters / hot water
Water heaters are normally off — water arrives warm. If you prefer hot water: turn on the heater behind the kitchen (each villa).

🔒 Safe boxes
Each bedroom has a safe. Karina gives you the access code at check-in. We are not responsible for valuables not kept in the safes.

🏊 Pools
RdM: infinity facing the ocean · Morenas: private 11×5 m + kids' pool 4×3 m. Maintained daily.

🍳 Kitchens
Fully equipped in both villas. Chef Celene and team manage the areas during your stay.

🧹 Cleaning
Daily service. Weekly sheet change. Towels every 3 days.

🚿 Towels
Bath and beach included in both villas.

🛒 Last-minute shopping
OXXO 100 m from RdM. 'El Güero' store 400 m. Tortilla shop 300 m.

🚨 Emergencies
Karina available during your stay — on either property or via Airbnb message.

— Alexander 🌅
· rincondelmar
· club

instrucciones_salida.content:
Check-out 11 AM. Before leaving, please:

— Turn off A/C, fans and lights in both villas
— Leave the keys in the lockboxes at the entrances
— If you used the bedroom safes, leave them open and empty
— Notify Karina that you've left

If you need late checkout, let us know in advance.

Thank you for choosing us!

— Alexander 🌅
· rincondelmar
· club
